auth.label: API Token
auth.description: Turbot Pipes API token sent as a Bearer token. Create or manage tokens from your Turbot Pipes profile: https://turbot.com/pipes/docs/profile#tokens.

extraFields.label: User Handle
extraFields.description: Turbot Pipes user handle that owns the workspace used for Query API requests.

extraFields.label: Workspace Handle
extraFields.description: Turbot Pipes workspace handle where SQL queries should run.

actions.name: execute_query
actions.description: Execute a SQL query with the Turbot Pipes Query API and return rows plus query metadata.

sql.description: The SQL statement to execute in Turbot Pipes.

inputSchema.description: Input for executing a Turbot Pipes SQL query.

items.description: One Turbot Pipes SQL query result row.

rowCount.description: The number of rows returned by the query.

anyOf.description: The column name returned by Turbot Pipes.
The Turbot Pipes column type when returned.

items.description: A Turbot Pipes SQL query result column.

columns.description: Columns inferred from the query response.

anyOf.description: Turbot Pipes query metadata returned by the Query API.

raw.description: The raw Turbot Pipes Query API response.

outputSchema.description: A normalized Turbot Pipes SQL query result.
